turns.content:
<task>
Add a MergePatch() function that applies RFC 7396 JSON Merge Patch — null values remove keys, other values replace.
</task>

arguments.summary: Read pkg/json/parser.go — has Parse() for JSON string to map. Need to add MergePatch(original, patch) per RFC 7396: null = delete key, other values = replace/add.

arguments.summary: Added MergePatch() to pkg/json/parser.go implementing RFC 7396. Handles three cases: null values delete keys, nested objects merge recursively, scalars replace. All 4 tests pass including nested merge.
arguments.final_answer: Added JSON Merge Patch (RFC 7396) in pkg/json/parser.go. MergePatch() handles key deletion (null), recursive nested merging, and value replacement. All 4 tests pass.
